text: ⚡️ 🇮🇶 Iraq’s Oil Ministry says oil export revenues in March fell to around “$1.95 billion,” marking a 71% decline from February. The sharp drop comes amid reduced output, with Iraq significantly cutting exports over the past month. According to OPEC data, Iraq’s crude oil production has decreased by around “61%,” reflecting a major contraction in supply. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇶 伊拉克石油部表示，3月份石油出口收入降至约“19.5亿美元”，较2月份下降了71%。这一急剧下降是在产量减少的背景下发生的，伊拉克在过去一个月里大幅削减了出口。根据欧佩克的数据，伊拉克的原油产量减少了约“61%”，反映出供应量的大幅收缩。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Israeli airstrikes targeted Nabatieh, southern Lebanon, moments ago. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列空袭刚刚袭击了黎巴嫩南部的纳巴泰。 @wfwitness

text: ❗️ Sheikh Naim is speaking right now
text_zh: ❗️ 纳伊姆谢赫（Sheikh Naim）正在发表讲话

text: ⚡️ 🇷🇺 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Deputy Chairman of Russia’s Security Council Dmitry Medvedev says while many countries seek to “de-block” the Strait of Hormuz, the White House has chosen to block it. He questions the policy, writing “blocking = de-blocking?” and criticising what he describes as contradictory actions. He adds that “Orwell’s villains are resurging,” warning that such logic echoes the idea that “war is peace.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇷🇺 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 俄罗斯联邦安全会议副主席德米特里·梅德韦杰夫表示，尽管许多国家寻求“解除”霍尔木兹海峡的封锁，但白宫却选择了封锁它。他质疑这一政策，写道“封锁 = 解除封锁？”，并批评了他所描述的自相矛盾的行为。他补充说，“奥威尔笔下的恶棍正在卷土重来”，并警告说这种逻辑呼应了“战争即和平”的观点。 @wfwitness

text: 🇷🇺 Dmitry Medvedev comments on the blocking of the blockade. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 德米特里·梅德韦杰夫评论关于封锁的封锁。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺🇺🇦🇷🇺Newly elected Hungarian Prime Minister Magyar said Ukraine is the victim in its war with Russia, adding that he cannot expect Ukraine to give up territory. "So everyone in Hungary knows that Ukraine is the victim of this war and that Ukraine, based…" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇺🇦 🇪🇺 Newly elected Hungarian Prime Minister Magyar doesn't support accelerated EU accension for Ukraine. "From the beginning, we have said that we are not supporting the fast track, accession to the EU of Ukraine. It would be impossible that a country in war to be taken by the EU. These discussions cannot be held, all the chapters to discuss. So I don't think this has relevance, but I can see that there are some movements. So the people that we have spoken with, the member states, don't take this as a possible scenario. So all accession countries have to go through the same process." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺🇺🇦🇷🇺新当选的匈牙利总理马扎尔（Magyar）表示，乌克兰是俄乌战争的受害者，并补充说他不能指望乌克兰放弃领土。“所以匈牙利每个人都知道乌克兰是这场战争的受害者，而且乌克兰，基于……” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇺🇦 🇪🇺 新当选的匈牙利总理马扎尔不支持乌克兰加速加入欧盟。“从一开始我们就说过，我们不支持乌克兰加入欧盟的快速通道。一个处于战争状态的国家被欧盟接纳是不可能的。这些讨论无法进行，所有章节都需要讨论。所以我认为这没有意义，但我可以看到有一些动作。所以我们交谈过的人，成员国，并不认为这是一个可能的方案。所以所有加入国都必须经历相同的过程。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 Newly elected Hungarian Prime Minister Magyar said Ukraine is the victim in its war with Russia, adding that he cannot expect Ukraine to give up territory. "So everyone in Hungary knows that Ukraine is the victim of this war and that Ukraine, based on the Budapest Memorandum of 1994, it is the job of any Ukrainian government to protect this territorial integrity and sovereignty and no one should tell them that at the, hopefully at the end of a four-year war, what, under what conditions they should enter peace or sign a peace treaty. So we cannot say any country to give up their territory." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 新当选的匈牙利总理马扎尔表示，乌克兰是俄乌战争的受害者，并补充说他不能指望乌克兰放弃领土。“所以匈牙利每个人都知道乌克兰是这场战争的受害者，而且乌克兰，根据1994年的《布达佩斯备忘录》，保护这种领土完整和主权是任何乌克兰政府的工作，没有人应该告诉他们，在希望是四年战争结束时，他们应该在什么条件下进入和平或签署和平条约。所以我们不能说让任何国家放弃他们的领土。” @wfwitness

text: ❗️ Today marks the highest adaptation of FPVs by Hezbullah where they attacked 6 different locations Inshallah we have much more of these daily because the IDF is working in safe areas in the open and is a sitting duck. - Soldiers sleeping quarters in Yiftah base - Soldier staging area in Biet Hillel base - Soldiers sleeping quarters in Qiryat Shmona - Command room to manage firepower and military tent near Kfar Giladi artillery battery - Military room and tent in Kfar Giladi barracks - Military room and tent in Margaliot
text_zh: ❗️ 今天标志着真主党对FPV（第一人称视角无人机）的最高适应，他们袭击了6个不同的地点。因沙安拉（Inshallah），我们每天都会有更多这样的袭击，因为以色列国防军在开阔的安全区域活动，就像瓮中之鳖。 - Yiftah基地的士兵宿舍 - Biet Hillel基地的士兵集结区 - Qiryat Shmona的士兵宿舍 - 管理火力的指挥室和Kfar Giladi炮兵连附近的军用帐篷 - Kfar Giladi军营的军事室和帐篷 - Margaliot的军事室和帐篷

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump on Iran: Iran will not have a nuclear weapon... If they don't agree, there's no deal. There'll never be a deal. Iran will not have a nuclear weapon and we're going to get the dust back — either we'll get it back from them or…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump on if he would send Vice President Vance to negotiate with Iran again: "Well, he's done a good job. Steve and Jared, they've all done a very good job. And, I can tell you that we've been called by the other side. They'd like to make a deal very badly, very badly." @wfwitness

text_zh: 特朗普：你认为男性应该参加女子体育比赛吗？ DoorDash员工：我对此真的没有意见。

text: 📝 Important to note: Trump’s threats aren’t just directed at Iran; they target any country or ship that pays a toll to Iran to pass through the Strait of Hormuz. “No one who pays an illegal toll will have safe passage.” — Trump
text_zh: 📝 重要提示：特朗普的威胁不仅针对伊朗；它们针对任何向伊朗支付通行费以通过霍尔木兹海峡的国家或船只。“任何支付非法通行费的人都不会有安全通道。” — 特朗普

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇺🇸 Kan: Senior IDF officials have briefed Israel’s ambassador to the United States, Yechiel Leiter, ahead of his meetings with Lebanese ambassador Nada Hamada Maoued in Washington. The unusual briefing was requested by the ambassador and approved by…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 Kan : A political source in the anti‑Hezbollah camp in Lebanon expressed pessimism ahead of Tuesday’s direct talks between Israeli and Lebanese ambassadors in Washington, saying progress will be difficult as long as Lebanon prioritises a ceasefire over disarming Hezbollah. Behind the scenes, a struggle is under way between Hezbollah’s Shia camp, which seeks only a ceasefire, and the opposing camp pushing for disarmament. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇺🇸 Kan：以色列国防军高级官员在以色列驻美国大使耶希尔·莱特（Yechiel Leiter）与黎巴嫩大使娜达·哈马达·马乌德（Nada Hamada Maoued）在华盛顿会晤前，向其通报了情况。这次不同寻常的简报是由大使要求的，并得到了……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 Kan：黎巴嫩反真主党阵营的一位政治消息人士在周二以色列和黎巴嫩大使在华盛顿举行直接会谈前表示悲观，称只要黎巴嫩将停火置于解除真主党武装之上，进展将很困难。在幕后，真主党的什叶派阵营（只寻求停火）与推动解除武装的对立阵营之间正在进行一场斗争。 @wfwitness

text: Reporter: Did you post that picture of yourself depicted as Jesus Christ? Trump: I did post it, and I thought it was me as a doctor. It had to do with the Red Cross, as a Red Cross worker.
text_zh: 记者：你发布了那张把自己描绘成耶稣基督的照片吗？ 特朗普：我确实发布了，我以为那是我作为一名医生。这与红十字会有关，作为一名红十字会工作人员。

text: 🇺🇸 Trump says he won't apologize to Pope Leo XIV. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 特朗普说他不会向利奥十四世教皇道歉。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump: We believe in law and order, and Pope Leo seems to have a problem with that. There is nothing to apologize for; he is wrong.
text_zh: 特朗普：我们信仰法律和秩序，而利奥教皇似乎对此有问题。没有什么可道歉的；他错了。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇨🇺 U.S. President Trump on Cuba: Cuba has been a terribly run country for a long long time. It's got a bad system. It's been very oppressive, as you know. And we have a lot of great Cuban Americans, all of whom just about voted for me. And they were…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump on Iran: Iran will not have a nuclear weapon... If they don't agree, there's no deal. There'll never be a deal. Iran will not have a nuclear weapon and we're going to get the dust back — either we'll get it back from them or we'll take it. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇨🇺 美国总统特朗普谈古巴：古巴长期以来一直是一个管理糟糕的国家。它的制度很糟糕。正如你所知，它一直非常压迫。我们有很多伟大的古巴裔美国人，他们几乎都投了我的票。他们……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普谈伊朗：伊朗不会拥有核武器...如果他们不同意，就没有协议。永远不会有协议。伊朗不会拥有核武器，我们要把尘埃拿回来——我们要么从他们那里拿回来，要么我们就去抢。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸 President Trump on posting an image of himself depicted as Jesus Christ: I did post it, and I thought it was me as a doctor, and had to do with Red Cross, as a Red Cross worker there, which we support... It’s supposed to be me as a doctor, making people…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇺 U.S. President Trump on Cuba: Cuba has been a terribly run country for a long long time. It's got a bad system. It's been very oppressive, as you know. And we have a lot of great Cuban Americans, all of whom just about voted for me. And they were treated very badly. In many cases, family members have been killed. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸 美国总统特朗普谈发布一张把自己描绘成耶稣基督的照片：我确实发布了，我以为那是我作为一名医生，这与红十字会有关，作为那里的红十字会工作人员，我们支持...它应该是作为医生的我，让人们……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇺 美国总统特朗普谈古巴：古巴长期以来一直是一个管理糟糕的国家。它的制度很糟糕。正如你所知，它一直非常压迫。我们有很多伟大的古巴裔美国人，他们几乎都投了我的票。他们受到了非常糟糕的对待。在许多情况下，家庭成员被杀害。 @wfwitness

text: Trump: We may stop by Cuba after we’re finished with Iran.
text_zh: 特朗普：忙完伊朗后，我们可能会顺道去趟古巴。

text: An army? No a police force Downgrade to a police force and free up the budget. That's the most you could live up for
text_zh: 一支军队？不，一支警察部队。降级为警察部队并腾出预算。这是你能达到的最高水平

text: 🔄 Forwarded from ResistanceTrench mirror: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ REPORTER: Did you post that picture of yourself depicted as Jesus Christ? TRUMP: I did post it and I thought it was me as a doctor
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 ResistanceTrench mirror： 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 记者：你发布了那张把自己描绘成耶稣基督的照片吗？ 特朗普：我确实发布了，我以为那是我作为一名医生

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ REPORTER: Did you post that picture of yourself depicted as Jesus Christ? TRUMP: I did post it and I thought it was me as a doctor
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 记者：你发布了那张把自己描绘成耶稣基督的照片吗？ 特朗普：我确实发布了，我以为那是我作为一名医生
